title: The Bouncy Bridge
premise_summary: A bridge that bounces too much
cover_description: Pip, tiny and wide-eyed, clings to a giant bird’s nest perched on a wispy cloud, while the bouncy bridge below stretches like a trampoline gone wild.
host_intro: Tonight, Pip tries to cross a bridge. The bridge has other plans.
host_outro: Pip is still bouncing. The bridge is very proud.
script:
[TITLE: The Bouncy Bridge]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Pip tries to cross a bridge. The bridge has other plans.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Pip is still bouncing. The bridge is very proud.]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: physical_escalation]

[SETUP]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: curious, excited] What’s this long stretchy thing tied between two trees? [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: confident, gentle] That’s the new bouncy bridge, Pip! Just step on and walk across.
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: tentative] I’m stepping on… why is it wobbling like a jelly snake? [STING: slide_whistle]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: dismissive] Oh, that’s just the bounce! Keep going, you’ll be fine.
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: panicked] I’m not fine! I just bounced up to my knees! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] Hmm. Maybe hop instead of walk?
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: outraged] I hopped! Now I’m bouncing over the treetops! [STING: whoosh]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] Oh dear. That’s… higher than expected.
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]I just bounced into a cloud and now I’m stuck in a bird’s nest! [/PUNCHLINE] [STING: big_crash]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: stunned, quiet] Well. That’s one way to cross.
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: Pip, tiny and wide-eyed, clings to a giant bird’s nest perched on a wispy cloud, while the bouncy bridge below stretches like a trampoline gone wild.]
[PREMISE: A bridge that bounces too much]
